name: chat
description: Foundational chat primitives: $conversational feature, $match scaffolding, sentinel match objects, $room/$exit geography, $chatroom template class, and the $portable/$furniture base classes other catalogs build on. No instances seeded — install @local:demoworld for the bundled Living Room demo.

verbs.name: match_object
verbs.source: verb :match_object(name, location) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: match_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_verb(name, target) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: match_command_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_command_verb(cmd, target) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: plan_command
verbs.source: verb :plan_command(text, target_space) rxd { return null; }

verbs.name: parse_command
verbs.source: verb :parse_command(text, who) rxd { return { text: text, actor: who }; }

classes.description: Stable sentinel returned when no visible object matches.
Stable sentinel returned when multiple visible objects match.
LambdaCore-shaped room base. Rooms are spaces with contents, present actors, exit-object lookup, room-authored look output, and announce/tell fanout helpers.

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); let roster = []; for who in contents(this) { let _is_player = false; try { _is_player = isa(who, $player); } except err { _is_player = false; } if (_is_player) { let idle = idle_seconds(who); let row = { id: who, name: who.name, presence: presence_status(who) }; if (idle != null) { row["idle_seconds"] = idle; } roster = roster + [row]; } } let visible = visible_contents(this); let remote_summaries = remote_describe(visible); let contents_rows = []; for item in visible { let _live = true; let _item_is_player = false; try { _item_is_player = isa(item, $player); } except errp { _live = false; } if (_live && !_item_is_player) { let title = item; let description = null; let is_remote = false; try { is_remote = is_remote_object(item); } except errr { _live = false; } if (_live) { if (is_remote) { let summary = null; if (typeof(remote_summaries) == "map" && has(remote_summaries, item)) { summary = remote_summaries[item]; } if (typeof(summary) == "map") { if (has(summary, "name") && summary["name"]) { title = summary["name"]; } if (has(summary, "description")) { description = summary["description"]; } } } else { let name_str = null; try { name_str = item.name; } except errn { _live = false; } if (_live) { title = name_str; try { title = item:title(); } except err { if (err["code"] != "E_VERBNF" && err["code"] != "E_TOOBIG") { raise err; } } try { description = item.description; } except err2 { description = null; } } } } if (_live) { contents_rows = contents_rows + [{ id: item, title: title, description: description }]; } } } return { id: this, title: this:title(), description: this.description, roster: roster, contents: contents_rows }; }

verbs.name: announce
verbs.source: verb :announce(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([actor], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all
verbs.source: verb :announce_all(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all_but
verbs.source: verb :announce_all_but(ignore, text, origin) rxd { for listener in contents(this) { let _is_player = false; try { _is_player = isa(listener, $player); } except err { _is_player = false; } if (_is_player && !(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } for item in contents(this) { if (item != origin) { let matched = null; try { matched = $match:match_verb("hear_parent_announce", item); } except err { matched = null; } if (typeof(matched) == "map") { try { item:hear_parent_announce(ignore, text); } except err { } } } } return true; }

verbs.name: match_exit
verbs.source: verb :match_exit(name) rxd { let exits = this.exits; if (name in exits) { return exits[name]; } return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: enterfunc
verbs.source: verb :enterfunc(object) rx { return true; }

verbs.name: exitfunc
verbs.source: verb :exitfunc(object) rx { return true; }

verbs.name: north
verbs.source: verb :north() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("north"); }

verbs.name: northeast
verbs.source: verb :northeast() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("northeast"); }

verbs.name: east
verbs.source: verb :east() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("east"); }

verbs.name: southeast
verbs.source: verb :southeast() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("southeast"); }

verbs.name: south
verbs.source: verb :south() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("south"); }

verbs.name: southwest
verbs.source: verb :southwest() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("southwest"); }

verbs.name: west
verbs.source: verb :west() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("west"); }

verbs.name: northwest
verbs.source: verb :northwest() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("northwest"); }

verbs.name: out
verbs.source: verb :out() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("out"); }

verbs.name: go
verbs.source: verb :go(exit) rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); let exit_obj = this:match_exit(exit); if (exit_obj == $failed_match) { let msg = "You can't go that way (" + exit + ")."; tell(actor, msg); return msg; } return exit_obj:invoke(); }

verbs.name: take
verbs.source: verb :take(object) rxd { let name = str_trim(object); if (!name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "take requires an object name" }; } let item = $match:match_object(name, this); if (item == $ambiguous_match) { raise { code: "E_AMBIGUOUS", message: "I don't know which " + str_char(34) + name + str_char(34) + " you mean.", value: name }; } if (item == $failed_match || item == this || location(item) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "I don't see " + str_char(34) + name + str_char(34) + " here.", value: name }; } if (item == actor || isa(item, $actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "actors are not carryable", value: item }; } let title = ""; try { title = item:title(); } except err { title = ""; } if (!title) { title = to_string(item); } let portable = false; try { portable = item.portable; } except err { portable = false; } if (portable != true) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: title + " is not carryable", value: item }; } moveto(item, actor); tell(actor, "You take " + title + "."); observe({ type: "taken", actor: actor, item: item, text: actor.name + " takes " + title + ".", ts: now() }); return { item: item, title: title }; }

verbs.name: drop
verbs.source: verb :drop(object) rxd { let name = str_trim(object); if (!name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "drop requires an object name" }; } let item = $match:match_object(name, actor); if (item == $failed_match || item == $ambiguous_match || location(item) != actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "You are not carrying " + str_char(34) + name + str_char(34) + ".", value: name }; } let title = ""; try { title = item:title(); } except err { title = ""; } if (!title) { title = to_string(item); } moveto(item, this); if (is_recycled(item)) { return { item: item, title: title, room: this, recycled: true }; } tell(actor, "You drop " + title + "."); observe({ type: "dropped", actor: actor, item: item, room: this, text: actor.name + " drops " + title + ".", ts: now() }); return { item: item, title: title, room: this }; }

classes.description: First-class room exit. Exits live in their source room's anchor cluster, carry aliases and movement messages, and invoke the LambdaCore-style moveto path.

verbs.name: invoke
verbs.source: verb :invoke() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:move(actor); }

verbs.name: move
verbs.source: verb :move(who) rxd { if (who != actor) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "exits only move the invoking actor", value: who }; } let source = this.source; let dest = this.dest; if (this.nogo_msg) { tell(who, this.nogo_msg); if (this.onogo_msg) { source:announce_all_but([who], who.name + " " + this.onogo_msg); } return this.nogo_msg; } if (!dest) { let msg = "You can't go that way."; tell(who, msg); return msg; } if (this.leave_msg) { tell(who, this.leave_msg); } moveto(who, dest); let left_text = who.name + " " + this.oleave_msg; observe_to_space(source, { type: "left", actor: who, room: source, destination: dest, exit: this.name, text: left_text, ts: now() }); if (this.arrive_msg) { tell(who, this.arrive_msg); } let entered_text = who.name + " " + this.oarrive_msg; observe_to_space(dest, { type: "entered", actor: who, room: dest, origin: source, exit: this.name, text: entered_text, ts: now() }); return { room: dest, from: source, exit: this.name, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: announce_msg
verbs.source: verb :announce_msg(place, who, text) rxd { return place:announce_all_but([who], who.name + " " + text); }

classes.description: Standalone chat room class. Conversational behavior comes from $conversational; inherited $room verbs provide exit-object movement and carryable object movement.
Carryable room object. Instances can move between room contents and actor inventory without changing host placement.

verbs.name: give
verbs.source: verb :give(recipient) rxd { let recipient_str = str_trim(recipient); if (!recipient_str) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "Give it to whom?" }; } if (location(this) != actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "You don't have that!", value: this }; } let here = location(actor); if (here == null) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "I see no " + str_char(34) + recipient_str + str_char(34) + " here." }; } let who = $match:match_object(recipient_str, here); if (who == $ambiguous_match) { raise { code: "E_AMBIGUOUS", message: "I don't know which " + str_char(34) + recipient_str + str_char(34) + " you mean.", value: recipient_str }; } let here_recipient = false; if (who != $failed_match && location(who) == here) { here_recipient = true; } if (who != $failed_match && !here_recipient) { here_recipient = (here in all_locations(who)); } if (who == $failed_match || !here_recipient) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "I see no " + str_char(34) + recipient_str + str_char(34) + " here.", value: recipient_str }; } if (who == actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "Give it to yourself?" }; } let item_title = ""; try { item_title = this:title(); } except err { item_title = ""; } if (!item_title) { item_title = to_string(this); } let who_title = ""; try { who_title = who:title(); } except err { who_title = ""; } if (!who_title) { who_title = to_string(who); } moveto(this, who); if (location(this) != who) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: who_title + " does not want that item.", value: who }; } tell(actor, "You hand " + item_title + " to " + who_title + "."); tell(who, actor.name + " hands you " + item_title + "."); return { item: this, recipient: who }; }

classes.description: Fixed room furnishing. It appears in room look output but is not carryable.

features.description: Feature object carrying live chat verbs for spaces.

verbs.name: can_be_attached_by
verbs.source: verb :can_be_attached_by(who) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: say_to
verbs.source: verb :say_to(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_to requires text" }; } if (recipient != null && recipient != this && recipient != actor && !isa(recipient, $player)) { let matched = $match:match_verb("on_say_to", recipient); if (typeof(matched) == "map") { return recipient:on_say_to(text); } } let audience = []; for row in this:room_roster() { let listener = row["id"]; if (recipient == actor || listener != recipient) { audience = audience + [listener]; } } observe({ type: "said_to", actor: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now(), _audience_override: audience }); /* Non-player command recipients returned above through :on_say_to; only players get targeted [to you] text. */ if (recipient != null && recipient != actor && isa(recipient, $player)) { tell(recipient, actor.name + " [to you] " + text); } return true; }

verbs.name: say_as
verbs.source: verb :say_as(style, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_as requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said_as", actor: actor, style: style, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "emote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: pose
verbs.source: verb :pose(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "pose requires text" }; } observe({ type: "posed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: quote
verbs.source: verb :quote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "quote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "quoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: self
verbs.source: verb :self(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "self requires text" }; } observe({ type: "self_pointed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: tell
verbs.source: verb :tell(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "tell requires text" }; } observe({ type: "told", from: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:look_at(this); }

verbs.name: look_at
verbs.source: verb :look_at(target) rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); let view = dispatch(target, "look_self", []); let text = ""; if (typeof(view) == "map") { if (has(view, "description") && view["description"]) { text = view["description"]; } let roster = []; if (has(view, "roster")) { roster = view["roster"]; } else { if (has(view, "present_actors")) { roster = view["present_actors"]; } } if (length(roster) > 0) { let names = ""; try { let present = []; for who in roster { if (typeof(who) == "map" && has(who, "id")) { who = who["id"]; } if (who != actor) { present = present + [who]; } } names = str_join(collect_prop(present, "name"), ", "); } except err { names = ""; } if (!names) { names = "nobody"; } if (text) { text = text + " "; } text = text + "Present: " + names + "."; } if (has(view, "contents")) { let things = ""; /* contents are preformatted by look_self */ for item in view["contents"] { if (things) { things = things + ", "; } if (typeof(item) == "map" && has(item, "title")) { things = things + item["title"]; } else { things = things + to_string(item); } } if (things) { if (text) { text = text + " "; } text = text + "You see " + things + "."; } } if (has(view, "mood") && view["mood"]) { if (text) { text = text + " "; } text = text + "Mood: " + view["mood"] + "."; } } else { text = to_string(view); } observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, target: target, text: text, look: view, ts: now() }); return view; }

verbs.name: who
verbs.source: verb :who() rxd { let roster = this:room_roster(); let names = []; for row in roster { if (typeof(row) == "map" && has(row, "id")) { names = names + [row["name"]]; } } let text = "Present: "; if (length(names) > 0) { text = text + str_join(names, ", "); } else { text = text + "nobody"; } text = text + "."; observe({ type: "who", source: this, actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, roster: roster, text: text, ts: now() }); return roster; }

verbs.name: room_roster
verbs.source: verb :room_roster() rxd { let rows = []; for item in contents(this) { let _is_player = false; try { _is_player = isa(item, $player); } except err { _is_player = false; } if (_is_player) { let idle = idle_seconds(item); let row = { id: item, name: item.name, presence: presence_status(item) }; if (idle != null) { row["idle_seconds"] = idle; } rows = rows + [row]; } } return rows; }

verbs.name: live_audience
verbs.source: verb :live_audience(observation) rxd { /* Fallback shape only: bundled runtimes bind the native handler, which applies observation routing and session liveness. */ let out = []; for row in this.session_subscribers { if (typeof(row) == "map" && has(row, "session")) { out = out + [row["session"]]; } } return out; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter(who) rxd { let old = location(actor); if (old != null && old != this && old != $nowhere) { try { observe_to_space(old, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: old, destination: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); } except err { } } moveto(actor, this); observe_to_space(this, { type: "entered", actor: actor, room: this, origin: old, text: actor.name + " entered.", ts: now() }); return { room: this, roster: this:room_roster(), here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave(who) rxd { let dest = actor.home; if (dest == null) { dest = $nowhere; } moveto(actor, dest); observe_to_space(this, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); return { room: dest, roster: this:room_roster(), here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: huh
verbs.source: verb :huh(text, reason) rxd { return actor:huh(text, reason, this); }

verbs.name: huh_plan
verbs.source: verb :huh_plan(text, reason) rxd { actor:huh(text, reason, this); return { ok: false, route: "huh", space: this, target: actor, verb: "huh", args: [text, reason, this], error: reason, text: text }; }

verbs.name: directed_plan
verbs.source: verb :directed_plan(rest, verb_name, original) rxd { rest = str_trim(rest); let cmd = $match:parse_command(verb_name + " " + rest, actor, this); let target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; let directed_text = cmd["dobj_prefix_rest"]; if (target == null || !directed_text) { return this:huh_plan(original, "Directed speech needs a recipient and text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: verb_name, args: [target, directed_text], cmd: cmd }; }

verbs.name: object_command_plan
verbs.source: verb :object_command_plan(cmd, original) rxd { let target = null; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix")) { target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; } if (target == null || target == this) { return null; } let rest = null; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix_rest")) { rest = cmd["dobj_prefix_rest"]; } if (!has(cmd, "verb")) { if (rest) { let say_matched = $match:match_verb("on_say_to", target); if (typeof(say_matched) == "map") { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: target, verb: say_matched["name"], args: [rest], cmd: cmd }; } } return null; } let matched = $match:match_verb(cmd["verb"], target); if (typeof(matched) != "map") { return null; } let route = "direct"; let plan_space = null; if (!matched["direct_callable"]) { route = "sequenced"; plan_space = this; } let call_args = []; if (rest) { call_args = [rest]; } let plan = { ok: true, route: route, space: plan_space, target: target, verb: matched["name"], args: call_args, cmd: cmd }; if (has(matched, "arg_spec")) { let spec = matched["arg_spec"]; if (typeof(spec) == "map" && has(spec, "command")) { let meta = spec["command"]; if (typeof(meta) == "map" && has(meta, "persistence")) { plan["persistence"] = meta["persistence"]; } } } return plan; }

verbs.name: command_plan
verbs.source: verb :command_plan(input) rxd { return $match:plan_command(input, this); }

verbs.name: command
verbs.source: verb :command(text) rxd { let plan = this:command_plan(text); if (!plan["ok"]) { return plan; } return execute_command_plan(plan); }

features.description: Feature object for acoustically transparent spaces. Local public speech reaches the space audience and is forwarded upward to the containing space; parent room announcements are also heard inside.

verbs.name: announce
verbs.source: verb :announce(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([actor], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all
verbs.source: verb :announce_all(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all_but
verbs.source: verb :announce_all_but(ignore, text, origin) rxd { for listener in contents(this) { let _is_player = false; try { _is_player = isa(listener, $player); } except err { _is_player = false; } if (_is_player && !(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { try { parent:announce_all_but(ignore, text, this); } except err { } } return true; }

verbs.name: hear_parent_announce
verbs.source: verb :hear_parent_announce(ignore, text) rxd { for listener in contents(this) { let _is_player = false; try { _is_player = isa(listener, $player); } except err { _is_player = false; } if (_is_player && !(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } return true; }

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { pass(text); let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { observe_to_space(parent, { type: "said", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { pass(text); let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { observe_to_space(parent, { type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: say_as
verbs.source: verb :say_as(style, text) rxd { pass(style, text); let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { observe_to_space(parent, { type: "said_as", actor: actor, style: style, text: text, ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: pose
verbs.source: verb :pose(text) rxd { pass(text); let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { observe_to_space(parent, { type: "posed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: quote
verbs.source: verb :quote(text) rxd { pass(text); let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { observe_to_space(parent, { type: "quoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: self
verbs.source: verb :self(text) rxd { pass(text); let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { observe_to_space(parent, { type: "self_pointed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return true; }

features.description: Feature object for cone-of-silence spaces. Parent room announcements are heard inside, but public speech from inside stays local unless another feature forwards it.

verbs.name: hear_parent_announce
verbs.source: verb :hear_parent_announce(ignore, text) rxd { for listener in contents(this) { let _is_player = false; try { _is_player = isa(listener, $player); } except err { _is_player = false; } if (_is_player && !(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } return true; }
